{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged golden madra
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Adama]] can create a shield of [[Forged golden madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
